item.title: Day 2 of making my Selene cosplay from Underworld - by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source: https://www.instagram.com/reel/DBHZIL8SRQD/ Hello everyone here is Day 2 of Making my Selene Cosplay for this year's Halloween :) I loved doing the embroidery on this project, I want to make more projects that require this in the future. It is very relaxing to focus on the stitches, clears my mind and puts me "in the zone" so easily. Day 3 will be the last day of this project ! Have a great day everyone! Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Smol collection of ANGERY
item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.title: Walking While Black
item.description: EDIT: I found what is purportedly the original source for this video, the boy's mother: -- TikTok, I really need some help, what you see here is my child being racially profiled, and followed by four grown men all because he was walking around OUR neighborhood… I guess we look like we don’t belong in a upscale neighborhood but Here is a little back story: The morning aftermath of hurricane Milton my son wanted to walk the neighborhood to talk to his girlfriend on his phone, because we didnt have power so his service was bad in the house. THIS is what he had to deal with. Even after telling these men he lives here they we’re not satisfied with his answer and continue to harass him.. this was not a 1 minute altercation, my son was followed for over 10 minutes dealing with this. I am so happy he recorded every moment, and thankful my child is still here. But I need to know how is it OK. I do not want to live in a community that does not welcome me and my children because the color of our skin. -- Source: https://www.tiktok.com/@qweenie333/video/7425689970108583214 Regarding the speculation of what the irate guy near the end is holding: a few people on the interwebs analyzing the video are confident it's a gun.
item.dc:creator: Emjayen

I need them legally.
Brutal.
I tried my hand at Bloodborne and it was too much for me. I LOVE the lore, though. Same with Elden Ring.
Yikes.
I hope my forever outfit is pajamas.
Never.
Nubbin in the sun tax!

item.title: Golden immediately becomes best friends with cat
item.description: Let’s be honest, goldens become best friends with everything immediately
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: We went exploring and found the wreck of the largest three masted ship ever built in Nova Scotia!!
item.description:
After some heavy rains this summer, we heard about an old ship that was now visible on the beach
We took a drive out to see for ourselves
Apparently The Hamburg (and the two other ships beside it in the sand) were abandoned here in the early 1920s
They’d been completely buried for so long, the community forgot they were there, and when the beach eroded, the originally thought it was an old wharf
That’s a pretty curvy wharf though!
Here’s where a stream has cut between the main part of the ship, and the prow
Some of the ship’s internal structure was visible as well
Here’s the outline of 2 more, side by side under the shoreline
To give a sense of size, here’s a pic from 1925 - look at the person on the beach on the bottom right of the boat!! You can see one of the other ships beside it.
It was quite the ship in its day. The biggest of its kind ever built in Nova Scotia!
item.dc:creator: drawnbyjohn

item.title: Wednseday WHOLESOME dump to warm your soul and lift your mood
item.description:
1. Kid gives interview
2. Dogs before and after the park
3
4
5. A victory is a victory, no matter how small
6. Man accidentally kicks cat and apologizes by showing it love
7. Being kind to a random person costs nothing
8. On the left: Lt Schoon letting a young man try on his gear after a station tour. On the right: Chief Schoon fitting that same young man in his first set of gear as a firefighter
9. He's a floater not a fighter
10. Haven't seen this controller in a long time, brings back nostalgia
11. This kind of looks out of the PJ LOTR movies
12. |It's too early kid, please go back to bed
13. Great best man
14. Hey! Nice hat... I mean cat
15. Today, I’m wanted to share that I’ve started reading an incredible book called Blood, Sweat & Pixels. It dives into the history of both indie and mainstream games, shedding light on the struggles developers face to bring them to life. I find it truly inspiring, especially as a an indie dev myself. The final chapter covers The Witcher 3, and learning about the immense effort and passion behind that game made me realize the high standards I should strive for. I was so motivated that I ended up buying the game the very next day! To be honest, I’ve been working on my own game for almost 19 months now, and it can get a bit frustrating at times. It’s challenging to stay focused on a single project for so long, especially while balancing everyday life. But this book reignited my passion, giving me the drive to keep pushing forward. Anyway, if you want to support the game, a simple wishlist would mean the world to me. Please check it out on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Here is a streamer that actually laughed at the ending of the demo. Made me feel awesome! :) P.S. 2HAVE A GREAT AND SUNNY WEEKEND, FRIENDOS!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Pinhead - Hellraiser
item.dc:creator: knightmage15

item.title: Backlogged memes: more literary memes
item.description:
WHY WOULDNT THE DAD BE SMÉAGOL
I sent this to my bestie and she said “it’s called tk maxxx here” and I said “wait what why???” And she didn’t answer so I guess we’re NOT besties damn
(Because ticks can’t get through the boots, you see) (and the boots go all the way up so they’re too high for) (do you) (do you get it)
Will never stop reposting pride and prejudice memes I relate to them so much. I married Darcy basically only he wasn’t this fucking stupid.
And it’s RUDE and UNFAIR
Wish I’d trained more for carrying a toddler up 6 flights of stairs, didn’t know how often I’d need that. Course getting an inhaler helped a lot. Who knew I had asthma??? Oh wait, I did, 17 years ago, but American doctors didn’t fucking listen
It’ll be so totally fun and safe and this pile of bricks and fresh mortar is completely irrelevant I swear
I wrote a guy like this into my book by accident. He has Bro Energy. Or possibly hobbit energy. The main distinction is in the attitude about food and they don’t usually have any
I would too GOD DAMN
I’d watch it.
It really must be. I can barely tell a station wagon from a sedan. Station wagons are a thing here but where I’m from it’s mostly trucks
This person is way more responsible about deer than I ever was.
He owes me for putting up with all his shit smh
I sent this to my editor and she LOLed
I had one of those and it was shit, but I am assuming this means they used the jar a lot? Like we got $500 for mine when we finally got rid of it. I get the point but it’s still throwing me off
Won’t need therapy in my woodland cottage~
This pun is so good it makes me angry
I’m the Frodo. I’ve come to terms with it. Only the heavy unbearable burden is just having a uterus and a cocktail of mental illness.
I either need better friends or we need to fucking revolt so people have money again
Oh you’ll find out. Might have a maggot colony by then though. I hired a cat sitter when we went to Portugal for 2 weeks and kiddo left an apple slice on the counter and the cat sitter didn’t do anything with it (or the cat vomit on every carpet I guess) and it released a swarm of fruit flies and had an entire ecosystem inside. My sister in Christ could you not throw it in the trash????
It’s both cute and true. I’m getting better at stuff as I go along but having my shitty little skill set has saved me a lot of time money and heartache and I am proud of it.
Apparently I sleep on my back. Have never fallen asleep or woken up on anything other than my side but woof those dreams
He’s HIBERNATING don’t FAT SHAME HIM Ps yall I lost like 30 pounds after moving here and dropped a couple of sizes and I regret it so much my boobs are a mess I wish I could go back in time and slap the eating disorder out of my stupid ass in my 20s because it didn’t help ANYTHING
LMAO that last line
Kiddo brought home Covid and it made my asthma sooooo much worse and it’s been like a month and still I suffer
It is. I have asthma exercise hurts so bad but it is also fun and makes me feel better I hate it it’s so stupid and how am I supposed to do it without my lungs hurting????
Eat themmmmm what are we waiting for??? Too busy being homophobic racist fat shaming ableist transphobic pieces of shit to each other??? Why are we turning on each other instead of turning on THEM
I need this. But I need it for like $5 because I already spent my birthday allowance
Tennessee: CAT ON A HOT TIN ROOF! It’s BRILLIANT! Everyone else: ummm hey man you ok?
A secret guild of pizza lovers convinced Dominos and little Caesar’s to intermarry for generations to make the perfect child who could learn the perfect stuffed crust recipe and…idk I haven’t gotten that far in the book yet. Wipe out humanity?
The chicken is skeptical
Or Mickey Mouse using the moon as a fucking clock. “It’s a crescent now, we have to get to the party before it’s full!” Fuck off
Me: I know, I heard that one at 4am already Cat: oh ok try this one *barfs on the rug*
Why is this so true. My kid will run into the GD street just to spite me.
Accurate
Sent this to my (extremely autistic) husband who replied “yessss suck it”
Sent this to my mom and she was like “aww rough day sweetie?” And now I am silently wondering who tf I lived with in high school bc it wasn’t this bitch
Due to unforeseen foreskin Do to unfortunate circumcisions Due to unforeskinned circumstances
This is how cooking shows always sound to me
Obligatory not-shutting-up-time about my book because I am working on the sequel today and I am very excited You know how assassins creed is about some idiot teenager becoming a mature badass man? This book is like that only they’re all still idiots, they can just fight and climb stuff better. The plot is: slightly braver idiot convinces bookworm idiot with anxiety that he should fight the system like his idiot brother did
In chapter 9 someone finally just pushes her into a fountain
This isn’t the real cover, it’s the one that I would’ve done if I was self publishing. The real one is cool, highly recommend going to check it out, it’s on Amazon and stuff
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious
